key_facts: The Multnomah Athletic Club (MAC) is one of the largest athletic clubs in the U.S., founded in 1891 in Portland, Oregon.
MAC has approximately 22,000 members and typically maintains a membership waiting list.
Located at 1849 SW Salmon Street in Portland's West Hills/Goose Hollow neighborhood.
Facilities include indoor/outdoor pools, gymnasiums, racquet courts, ballroom, dining rooms, and fitness centers.
